name: sdd-bootstrap
description: Interview-driven Spec-Driven Development bootstrap plugin. Generates requirements, design, ADRs, API contracts, tasks, traceability, and CI templates before implementation.

interface.longDescription: Interview-driven Spec-Anchored AI Development bootstrap for requirements, design, ADRs, contracts, tasks, traceability, and CI templates.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the sdd-bootstrap-interviewer skill to prepare a project for implementation.
